allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:/Program Files/Git/mingw64/etc/ssl/certs/ca-bundle.crt"\) { "ca-bundle EXISTS, bytes=" + \(Get-Item "C:/Program Files/Git/mingw64/etc/ssl/certs/ca-bundle.crt"\).Length } else { "ca-bundle MISSING" }; "---where sslBackend set---"; git config --show-origin --get http.sslBackend)

PowerShell(git config --global http.sslBackend schannel; "set to: " + \(git config --global --get http.sslBackend\); git fetch origin --quiet; "fetch exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; git status -sb | Select-Object -First 1)
